texto: As a songwriter, you respect and appreciate the writings of other people, and I often get asked, are there songs out there I wish I'd written? Yes. There's many of them!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Dolly Parton que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “As a songwriter, you respect and appreciate the writings of other people, and I often get asked, …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, people, wish, com foco em wish e you.
